name: ING Orange Everyday
one_liner: Fee-free everyday account with a $100+ referral bonus, 1% tap-and-pay cashback and free international ATMs — top pick for newcomers.
benefit: 1% cashback on tap-and-pay (up to ~$30/month when conditions met), no monthly fees, rebated international ATM fees worldwide, and a high-rate Savings Maximiser when paired together.
signup_bonus: ~$100–125 cash for new customers via a referral code (open Orange Everyday + Savings Maximiser, deposit $1,000, make 5 card purchases in first month) — verify current offer
referral_note: Use an existing member's referral code at sign-up so both of you get the bonus; grab one from OzBargain's ING referral thread.

how_to_join.action: Apply for ING Orange Everyday online at ing.com.au with a referral code
how_to_join.detail: You will need your TFN, AU address, ID (passport or licence), and an existing member's referral code to unlock the cash bonus.

how_to_join.action: Deposit your pay (min $1,000/month) and make 5+ settled card purchases each month
how_to_join.detail: These activate the 1% cashback, the rebated ATM fee, and the new-customer cash bonus.

how_to_join.action: Also open a Savings Maximiser to lock in bonus interest and qualify for the bonus
how_to_join.detail: The cash bonus and high Savings Maximiser rate both require the Orange Everyday conditions met each month.

risks: 1% cashback and bonus savings rate both require meeting monthly deposit and transaction conditions
Cash signup bonus needs a referral code and the full deposit/transaction steps — verify the current amount
ING is an online-only bank — all support is via phone or app
est_value: ~$100–125 signup bonus + ~$10–30/month cashback + market-leading Savings Maximiser interest when conditions met
